source.extractor: manual (mirror of rollback_60_real with Path C conditional-framework wording)

coverage.purpose: Post-#60-Path-C conditional-framework F2 fixture — validates that R4 PATTERN-A becomes framework-aware. Same structure as rollback_60_real (4 props: 1 axiom + 1 hypothesis + 2 case_split with f-extension claim) but axiom prop frames boundary as locally-imposed (post-Path-C), NOT as universal axiom. Used in TestR4PatternAFrameworkAware::test_f2_conditional_boundary_skips_pattern_a (#103).
sections: sec:setup (Iverson's law with conditional boundary clause)
sec:thm1 (hypothesis + Cases B, C with f-extension)
coverage.scenario: conditional_60_path_c: Post-Path-C state — axiom says 'imposed locally — not part of universal'; same η=f(s) hypothesis + Cases (B)(C) f-extension as rollback_60_real (no manuscript-side difference there).
coverage.expectation_pre_fix: R4 ERROR (false-positive — current regex sees η(1,s)=s substring and triggers PATTERN-A regardless of conditional framing)
coverage.expectation_post_fix: R4 PASS (framework-aware: axiom_frames_conditionally=True → has_universal_boundary_eta=False → PATTERN-A short-circuits)
